ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Air India Flight AI123
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for booking with Air India! Here is your flight itinerary confirmation for your upcoming trip.

Flight Details:
- Flight: AI123
- Date: 15 Oct 2026
- Departure: Mumbai (BOM) – 10:15 AM
- Arrival: Delhi (DEL) – 12:00 PM
- Seat: 12A (Aisle)
- Ticket Class: Economy

Baggage Allowance:
- 1 checked bag (23 kg)
- 1 carry‑on (7 kg)

Please review the details and let us know if any changes are required. To view your boarding pass and manage your booking, click <URL>.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our customer support.

Safe travels!

Air India Reservations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #456789 – Action Required
